title: App crash / hang highlighter
description: Keeps only application crash, hang, and Windows Error Reporting events (Application Error 1000 / Application Hang 1002 / WER fault buckets / unhandled .NET exceptions) so process failures are easy to flag in a noisy Event Log. Enable it to filter the view down to just the failures.

sections.name: CrashFilter
sections.description: Keep crash / hang / fault-report events, hide the rest

rules.name: keep-app-crashes
rules.match: Faulting application name:|stopped interacting with Windows|Fault bucket|unhandled exception|Application Hang|Application Error
